race.description: Kia Ora Bloodlines To Headlines Hcp
race.comment: FRIENDLY FIRE (1) slashing debut at Wagga, then stalked the speed with a determined head victory over 1200m at Randwick in the soft (7) going. Has further improvement to come and expected to run the trip with Grima's claim. Go close. HEARD OF HIM (3) is improving with racing and put away the older horses at his second race start with a gritty win over 1400m at Hawkesbury. Will roll forward from the gate and figure prominently. MARWOOBA (5) backs-up quickly after going back from the wide gate to finish a close-up sixth over 1250m at Canterbury last Monday. Cross-over nose band goes on and can race closer from the gate. Respect. IMINASTATE (8) ran on late from the wide gate to finish a tidy fifth over 1300m at Rosehill. Blinkers come off and looking for this trip.
